content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.chain_memory.memvid_bridge
FILE: cosmos/integration/chain_memory/memvid_bridge.py (448 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Memvid Bridge - Convert bot memory to/from MP4 video format.

Uses the memvid library to encode text-based memory into compact MP4 files
that can be stored on-chain efficiently.

CLASSES:
- MemoryChunk: A single memory chunk with metadata.
  Methods: def to_text(self) -> str
  Methods: def from_text(cls, text: str) -> 'MemoryChunk'
- BotMemoryPackage: Complete memory package for a bot.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict
- MemvidBridge: Bridge between bot memory and memvid MP4 encoding.

Handles:
- Extracting memory
  Methods: def extract_cosmos_memory(self, memory_path: Optional[str]=None) -> BotMemoryPackage
  Methods: def extract_hermes_memory(self, memory_path: Optional[str]=None) -> BotMemoryPackage
  Methods: def encode_to_mp4(self, memory_package: BotMemoryPackage, output_path: Optional[str]=None) -> Tuple[
  Methods: def decode_from_mp4(self, mp4_path: str, index_path: str) -> BotMemoryPackage
  Methods: def get_memory_stats(self, memory_package: BotMemoryPackage) -> Dict
